rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns residential property tax appraised value. Gov't Code §1372.0321 governs bond reservation priorities for qualified residential rental projects. The two provisions address unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote: In granting reservations to issuers of qualified residential rental project issues, the board shall give first priority to projects that:
_note: No conflict identified. The rule text concerns tax-exempt bond allocation priorities for rental projects, not homestead exemptions.
